heading: Foreign landing certificates
label: 1622 Foreign landing certificates
text: The Secretary of the Treasury may by regulations require the production of landing certificates in respect of merchandise exported from the United States, or in respect of residue cargo, in cases in which he deems it necessary for the protection of the revenue, or to comply with international obligations.
notes: Amendments1986— inserted “, or to comply with international obligations” before period at end.Pub. L. 99–570
amendments: Amendments1986— inserted “, or to comply with international obligations” before period at end.Pub. L. 99–570
